commit.message:
Add README with architecture overview, setup, and API docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement notification system with server cluster, workers, emulators, and load testing

- Notification server: REST API, input validation, template rendering, Redis caching, RabbitMQ routing
- Notification worker: 4 dedicated queue consumers (APNS/FCM/SMS/EMAIL) with retry logic
- Third-party emulator: simulates delivery services with 95% success rate
- Device emulator: receives notifications, WebSocket broadcast, REST stats
- Load client: seeds test data, multi-threaded load test with p95/p99 reporting
- Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Prometheus, Grafana with pre-provisioned dashboard
- Docker Compose with service health checks and replicas
- 27 unit tests covering validation, services, controllers, consumers
- Component diagram in drawio format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: add GitBook documentation structure

Complete documentation covering:
- Getting started (installation, quick start, configuration)
- Core concepts (ACO algorithm, pheromone matrix, topology, strategies)
- Solana integration (leader schedule, TPU direct send, stake-weighted QoS)
- TypeScript SDK (overview, RevmClient, AcoRouter)
- Reference (benchmarks, academic papers)

commit.message:
Implement Extended Link Opaque LSA parser and database detail display

- Parse Extended Link TLV (RFC 7684 §3) with Adj-SID (RFC 8665 §5)
  and LAN Adj-SID (RFC 8665 §6) Sub-TLVs
- Add show database detail output for Extended Link LSAs
- Clean up remaining debug println statements in ifsm.rs and inst.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement OSPF SR TLV parsing and database detail display

- Move SidLabelTlv to packet-utils crate for sharing between isis-packet and ospf-packet
- Add OSPF-style SID/Label Sub-TLV parser (2+2 byte header vs IS-IS 1+1)
- Parse RouterInfo TLVs: SID/Label Range, Local Block, Router Capability, Algorithm
- Implement Extended Prefix Opaque LSA parser (RFC 7684) with Prefix SID Sub-TLV (RFC 8665)
- Add "show ip ospf database detail" output for Opaque Area LSAs with SR details
- Clean up debug println statements in nfsm.rs

commit.message:
Fix Game Master mode: clamp temperature to 1.0 for Anthropic API

Anthropic rejects temperature > 1.0 (OpenAI allows up to 2.0), causing
400 errors on premise generation in Game Master and Inner Voice modes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Redesign backend admin UI: command center, card-based layouts, unified contacts

- Replace trip dashboard with Command Center showing stats, opportunities to discover, and recent activity
- Add responsive sidebar with mobile bottom nav, terracotta active states, streamlined 5-item navigation
- Redesign bookings page with card-based layout, inline filters, and "Find Nearby Leads" CTA per booking
- Streamline campaigns page with consistent card design and inline filter bar
- Add unified Contacts page merging leads, subscribers, and group requests into tabbed interface
- Remove Analytics (placeholder), Messaging (disabled), and Outreach (merged into campaigns) from nav

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: bill payments tab showing empty due to BillResource crash

BillPaymentResource wrapped selectively-loaded bill in BillResource,
which triggered Bill's $with (auto-loading currency/company with null
FKs) and $appends (accessors crashing on null columns). Now returns
inline array and uses ->without() to prevent auto-eager-loading.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): remove duplicate installer builds from release.yml

The build-installers.yml workflow handles tray installer builds and uploads
them directly to the GitHub Release via softprops/action-gh-release. Having
a second build-installers matrix in release.yml caused two problems:

1. Missing GH_TOKEN on the build step caused electron-builder to fail
2. softprops/action-gh-release (build-installers.yml) creates the release
   before gh release create (release.yml) runs, causing a conflict

Fix: remove the duplicate build-installers matrix from release.yml entirely.
The create-release job now runs without waiting on installers, and falls back
to gh release upload if the release was already created by build-installers.yml.

commit.message:
chore: groom backlog — reset to agentic foundation (#182)

* docs(claude): add agent-forward design invariant

GitPulse has an LLM in the loop. Before adding any capability, the
question is "can the model do this with existing or expanded tools?"

Adds Agent-Forward Design section defining model territory vs code
territory. Prevents reaching for deterministic parsers/classifiers
when the agent already handles the task natively.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: migrate vision.md to project.md with agentic focus

Replaces the old B2C report-generator vision with the new direction:
intelligent agent over git history, CLI/TUI first, agentic UX.

Adds domain glossary, quality bar, active focus, and lessons learned
sections per the project.md format standard.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add grooming plan and session artifacts

Records the 2026-03-07 grooming session:
- 83 pre-rebuild issues closed
- 6 new agent-native issues created
- 2 issues closed mid-session (agent-forward design violations)
- Execution order and deferred items documented

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Polish form spacing: label margins, section dividers, alt-contact gaps

Pixel-perfect tweaks for mobile form fields:

- Form divider .25rem → .75rem (clearer section break)
- Alt contact gaps 8px → 12px (consistent with form spacing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace abstract/vague/poetic language with concrete, specific copy site-wide

Home:
- Beepball: "the same alignment" abstraction replaced with literal description —
  he hears a beep, tracks the sound, swings, hits home runs, won Offense MVP
- "He creates the conditions for you to stop running past it" → "He does not give
  you the answer. He asks the question that makes your own answer impossible to ignore."

About:
- "legally blind" removed in both origin story and beepball section
- "He went into integration. The moment arrived." → concrete account of what
  actually happened: stopped moving, answered the questions, saw the pattern himself
- Beepball abstract "same alignment / clearing of counterintention" → the specific
  mechanics: ball beeps, he cannot see it, tracks the sound, competes with it
- "What changes" section: replaces "something shifts / True Self / true purpose"
  with specific outcomes — the relationship that ended the same way three times,
  the financial ceiling, the decision circled for six months
- Three levels blockquote: replaces poetic "grounded enough to live in the full
  human experience" with concrete — he still gets angry, still makes mistakes,
  still has blind spots; the work is about not being run by them without knowing it

Work-with-me:
- Before→after grid: all 4 items rewritten to be specific and concrete
- Integration step: replaces "embody it / living from it" with what actually happens

commit.message:
feat(P5): 成交量/籌碼異動即時警報（anomaly-scan）

新增 anomaly-scan CLI 命令，掃描 watchlist 四類量化異常訊號：

四個純函數（main.py）
- detect_volume_spike()：今日量 > 近 lookback 天均量 × threshold
- detect_institutional_buy()：最新日外資 net > threshold（name.contains("外資") 篩選）
- detect_sbl_spike()：最新日 sbl_change > mean + sigma×std（≥3 筆才計算）
- detect_broker_concentration()：最新日 HHI(淨買超分點) > 門檻 AND 淨買 > 0

聚合與命令（main.py）
- _compute_anomaly_scan()：從 DailyPrice/InstitutionalInvestor/SecuritiesLending/BrokerTrade 四表讀取，呼叫四個純函數，回傳 dict[str, DataFrame]
- cmd_anomaly_scan()：console 分類顯示 + Discord 通知
- anomaly-scan subparser（--stocks/--lookback/--vol-mult/--inst-threshold/--sbl-sigma/--hhi-threshold/--notify）

morning-routine 整合
- cmd_morning_routine()：TOTAL 6→7，新增 Step 7 anomaly-scan
- _build_morning_discord_summary()：新增 🚨 籌碼異動區塊（摘要 4 類警報）

測試（tests/test_anomaly.py）
- 12 個純函數測試（零 mock），覆蓋觸發/不觸發/資料不足三類邊界
- 含外資 name 篩選測試（投信不計入）、HHI 均勻分布不觸發測試
- 全套測試：693 passed（+12 vs 681）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Refine chat UI: minimal avatars, unified black background

- Replace default orange avatars with > (user) and $ (assistant) symbols

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove options stop-loss, increase time exit to 90min

Backtest on 65 Skew Charm trades: 40% SL would stop 20 of 50 winners
(40% of wins dip 5+ pts before winning), losing +221 pts of profit
while only saving +90 pts on 6 losses. Net: SL HURTS by -131 pts.

- Remove OPTIONS_STOP_LOSS_PCT entirely
- Increase OPTIONS_MAX_HOLD_MIN from 20 to 90 (winning trades avg 30m+)
- Max risk is just the option premium ($3-8)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix typos and add language rules for Python, Java, Go, and Odin (#541)

* Fix typos and add language rules for Python, Java, Go, and Odin

- Fix Coq "Theorm" typo that prevented matching real Theorem definitions
- Fix Python test data typo ("12i34" → "1234")
- Add Python rules: async def, lambda assignment
- Add Java rules: enum, @interface, grep/git-grep function variant
- Add Go rules: interface type, general type definition
- Add Odin rules: proc (function), struct/enum/union (type)
- Rename React tests from numeric (test1-5) to descriptive names
- Remove commented-out obsolete test (history in git)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address review: anchor Python lambda rule, add Go 1.18+ generics support

- Python lambda: anchor regex to line start (^\\s*) to prevent false
  positives on keyword args like foo(test=lambda x: x)
- Go type rules: add optional type parameter clause (\\[...\\])? to
  support Go 1.18+ generics like type test[T any] []byte

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add comment explaining Java grep/git-grep function rule limitation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add word boundary to Odin type rule to prevent prefix matching

Prevents false positives like 'test :: structure_builder' matching
as a struct type definition. Also adds test coverage for bit_set
and bit_field branches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Broaden Odin proc rule to match proc{} and add Odin comment entries

- Odin function rule now matches both proc(...) and proc{} forms
- Added Odin // and /* comment entries to dumb-jump-language-comments
  for proper comment-line filtering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Require :: (not single :) in Odin proc function rule

Single-colon `test: proc()` is a type annotation, not a definition.
Only double-colon `test :: proc()` should match as a function.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix cam/timing system: insufficient dwell between claw retract and shutter open

Restructure cam profile to eliminate phase wrapping across 0° and ensure
film is fully stationary with registration pin engaged before exposure.

New phase map (no wrap-around):
  0°-180° exposure, 185°-190° engage, 190°-330° pulldown,
  330°-335° retract, 335°-350° return, 350°-360° dwell

- Replace modified trapezoidal profile with cycloidal (modified sine)
  motion for zero velocity at stroke endpoints and finite jerk
- Increase dwell before shutter open from 5° to 10°
- Path now closes exactly (position at 0° = position at 360°)
- Film velocity confirmed 0 mm/s at shutter open for both 18/24 fps
- All 7 critical timing rules pass

commit.message:
fix: gamepad API blocked in Streamlit iframe — use window.top

Chrome's Permissions-Policy blocks navigator.getGamepads() in iframes
that lack an explicit allow="gamepad" attribute. Streamlit's component
iframe doesn't set this, so the controller was silently ignored.

Fix: attach gamepadconnected/gamepaddisconnected to window.top and call
window.top.navigator.getGamepads() instead. Components are same-origin
so window.top access is permitted.

Also replace window.confirm() calls (blocked in iframes) with an
inline confirmation div. Switch from setInterval to requestAnimationFrame
for the poll loop to avoid drift and unnecessary CPU when tab is hidden.

break CommonMark list continuity, making the linter see new lists.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: observability/memory endpoint returns nested snapshot structure

The endpoint was re-querying SQLite and returning a flat dict with
'episodes', 'concepts', 'traits' keys. SelfModelService.get_memory_richness()
(and test scenarios) expect the nested operational.memory_pressure structure
with 'episode_count', 'concept_count', 'trait_count'.

Replaced the manual DB queries with SelfModelService.get_snapshot() which
already produces the canonical nested structure (cached, sub-ms). The
MemoryStore-specific fields (working_memory, gists, facts, queues) are merged
in alongside.

Closes #51

commit.message:
fix: queryEngine covers all selected interests, not just first 3

Bug: slice(0,2) per interest + size>=6 cap meant only the first 3 selected
interests were ever searched — the rest silently dropped.

Fix: 1 keyword per interest (first = most specific), cap raised to 10.
With 24 categories a user can select many — all get representation in search.

Also: Konfo API size 40→60 per query for broader result pool per keyword.

Example before: user selects it+sales+finance+ai-data+cybersecurity
  → searched: ohjelmointi, tietotekniikka, myynti, markkinointi, taloushallinto, kirjanpito
  → ai-data and cybersecurity completely ignored

After: ohjelmointi, myynti, taloushallinto, digitalisaatio, kyberturvallisuus,
  varhaiskasvatus... (one per interest, up to 10) + kansanopisto
